creator: pi@FreeBSD.org
text:
Testbuilding on 12a has this:

checking for OPENSSL... no
configure: error: please install libssl-dev or openssl-devel
===>  Script "configure" failed unexpectedly.
Please report the problem to meta+ports@vmeta.jp [maintainer] and attach the
"/wrkdirs/usr/ports/net/xrdp-devel/work/xrdp-0.9.1/config.log" including the
output of the failure of your make command. Also, it might be a good idea to
provide an overview of all packages installed on your system (e.g. a
/usr/local/sbin/pkg-static info -g -Ea).
*** Error code 1
